sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59265" key="korwnobo/los" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κορωνοβόλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n59265.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shooting crows</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κορωνοβόλον, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen></foreign>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sling</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bow for crow-shooting</tr_>, etc., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.546</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
